column1: Mr Smith will be one_____________years old next month. (HUNDRED)
We will be very happy to visit Mrs Smith on her one____________birthday. (HUNDRED)
The Smiths have got a lot of____________in the garden. (LILY)
Children, there is some salad in the fridge. Help___________ . (YOU)
Look at the tree! It looks really_____________and lovely. (PEACEFUL)
Muscles get___________and_____________if they are used a lot. That's why_____________practise____________ . (BIG/STRONG/SPORTSMAN/REGULAR)
